title: Multi-fixture local live mini-run repeatability
problem: Ticket-065 proved the hybrid mini-run on a single calibration source. Operators cannot yet batch the same report-only spine across multiple controlled fixtures to detect overfitting or fixture-specific brittleness.
acceptance_criteria: Default run executes four committed creativity source fixtures sequentially.
Each fixture writes an individual probe_mini_run report; suite writes probe_mini_run_suite summary.
Suite summary records per-fixture stage counts, contradiction_input_mode, and floors_met.
All reports remain db_writes false with no default DB or public export writes.
Mock pytest and verify remain green without Ollama.
No ticket drafting or queue promotion APIs are invoked.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-mini-run-suite with ollama opt-in on operator machine
non_goals: Do not persist accepted candidates to default or scratch SQLite.
Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not let Qwen author or promote implementation tickets.
Do not require pure chained contradiction across all fixtures.
rollback_plan: Revert suite orchestrator, CLI, tests, and docs. No schema migrations.
